name: tombstone-payload
description: A tombstone (`status: deleted`) MUST NOT carry any field beyond `id`/`recordType`/`status` (§7.1, §7.5). §7.1 exempts a tombstone from all otherwise-required fields 'except id, recordType, and status', and §7.5 states 'an on-the-wire tombstone contains strictly the id, recordType, and status: deleted fields' (GDPR Article 17 erasure). A tombstone still carrying a payload field like `performance` fails to strip metric data and MUST be schema-rejected.
